description:
Exposes local Git repository operations as agent tools. 
Covers clone, init, status, log, show, diff, blame, stage, commit, stash, branch management, pull, push, and code search. 
Runs entirely in-process without requiring a host git installation. 
Supports secure authentication via personal access tokens and SSH keys.

authType.description: How to authenticate with remote repositories.
authType.title: Authentication Type

readOnlyMode.description: Block ALL write operations (clone, init, write_file, stage, commit, stash push/pop/drop, branch create/delete, checkout, merge, fetch, pull, push). Read-only tools (status, log, show, diff, blame, file_at, branch_list, grep, ls_files, stash list) remain available. Strictly stronger than Safe Mode. Recommended when the agent only needs to inspect a repository.
readOnlyMode.title: Read-Only Mode

repoPath.description: Local path to an existing repository, or a remote URL (https://, git@, ssh://). A remote URL is cloned into a temporary directory at pipeline start and cleaned up on exit. Leave blank to let the agent call clone or init at runtime.
repoPath.title: Repository Path

safeMode.description: Block destructive operations: force-push and force branch deletion. Normal branch deletion is allowed only when the branch is fully merged into HEAD; deleting an unmerged branch requires force=true (which is blocked in safe mode). Recommended for agent use.
safeMode.title: Safe Mode

sshKey.description: PEM-encoded SSH private key content (starts with -----BEGIN ...). Used when Auth Type is SSH.
sshKey.title: SSH Private Key

sshPassphrase.description: Passphrase for the SSH private key, if encrypted. Leave empty for unencrypted keys.
sshPassphrase.title: SSH Key Passphrase

token.description: Personal access token or password for HTTPS authentication. Leave empty when using SSH.
token.title: Token / Password

username.description: Git username for token-based HTTPS authentication.
username.title: Username

ui:enumNames: No — allow writes (subject to Safe Mode)

title: Git
